title: helenium linifolium
intro: Helenium linifolium, also known as linear-leaf sneezeweed or threadleaf sneezeweed, is a plant species in the sunflower family native to North America. It is used in herbal medicine due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, which can be beneficial in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Helenium linifolium include relieving respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as providing anti-inflammatory effects for conditions like arthritis and gout. Herbal preparations of Helenium linifolium can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in various forms of treatment.
